modelName: WNBA Correlation-Aware Player Prop Model V1
claimBoundary: WNBA V1 uses historical boxscore logs plus supplied prop lines. It is a ranking and calibration model, not a guarantee. Live betting claims require current lines, player availability, and settled forward audit.

executionProfile.label: FanDuel Live Mode
executionProfile.proofBoundary: Small FanDuel-only replay after availability gates; too few settled six-pick dates to replace archive proof.

archiveSelector.label: Archive-ML selector proof
archiveSelector.proofBoundary: Archive/cross-source proof; not automatically transferable to live FanDuel availability.

fanDuelStrictShadow.label: Limited FanDuel availability replay
fanDuelStrictShadow.proofBoundary: Small FanDuel-only replay after availability gates; too few settled six-pick dates to replace archive proof.

proofContext.liveFanDuelClaim: The website card uses FanDuel-live model selection. Archive/cross-source proof is research context only, and it does not transfer to strict single-book execution.

sgpExposure.note: FanDuel can reprice cards with multiple legs from one game as SGP/SGP-plus, so archive hit rate and standard parlay payout math should not be assumed.

warnings: Independent parlay probability assumes leg independence; same-game and same-team correlation can change realized results.
Some rows are missing both over_odds and under_odds, so those rows are ranked without true price edge.
Some sourced rows have only the pick-side book price, so price edge is approximate rather than full no-vig.
Only 1 rows cleared the current gates for a 6-pick target.
FanDuel-live card is experimental: the 51.85% archive proof does not transfer to strict FanDuel execution.
Independent parlay probability assumes leg independence; same-game and same-team correlation can change realized results.
sourceNote: SportsGrid public WNBA game pages showing FanDuel player props; selected rows require FanDuel source and playable side odds.
